from agent.observability.models import UniversalTurnPayload, UniversalTurn, ToolCall, TokenUsage, HealthResponse, IngestSuccessResponse

# Test creation
turn = UniversalTurn\(
    index=0,
    userMessage=''Hello'',
    assistantResponse=''Hi there'',
    model=''claude-sonnet-4.5'',
    toolCalls=[ToolCall\(name=''read_file'', input=''{""path"": ""test.ts""}''\)],
    tokens=TokenUsage\(prompt=100, completion=50\),
\)

payload = UniversalTurnPayload\(
    format=''copilot-chat'',
    agent=''GitHub Copilot'',
    projectName=''test'',
    turns=[turn],
\)

print\(''Payload created OK''\)
print\(f''  format: {payload.format}''\)
print\(f''  turns: {len\(payload.turns\)}''\)
print\(f''  turn[0].toolCalls: {len\(payload.turns[0].toolCalls\)}''\)
print\(f''  turn[0].tokens.prompt: {payload.turns[0].tokens.prompt}''\)

# Test validation failure
try:
    bad = UniversalTurnPayload\(format=''test'', agent=''test'', turns=[]\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''Validation error \(expected\): {type\(e\).__name__}''\)

# Test model_dump
d = payload.model_dump\(exclude={''phoenixUrl''}\)
print\(f''model_dump keys: {list\(d.keys\(\)\)}''\)

# Test JSON schema generation
schema = UniversalTurnPayload.model_json_schema\(\)
print\(f''JSON Schema title: {schema.get\(""title""\)}''\)
print\(f''JSON Schema required: {schema.get\(""required""\)}''\)
")

import sys
try:
    from agent.observability.trace_bridge_api import app
    print\(''[PASS] trace_bridge_api imports successfully''\)
    
    # Check routes
    routes = [r.path for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, ''path''\)]
    print\(f''[PASS] Routes registered: {routes}''\)
    
    # Verify the /ingest endpoint uses Pydantic model
    for route in app.routes:
        if hasattr\(route, ''path''\) and route.path == ''/ingest'':
            # Check if endpoint has type annotations
            import inspect
            sig = inspect.signature\(route.endpoint\)
            params = dict\(sig.parameters\)
            if ''payload'' in params:
                annotation = params[''payload''].annotation
                print\(f''[PASS] /ingest uses typed parameter: {annotation.__name__}''\)
            else:
                print\(''[WARN] /ingest parameter not named payload''\)
            break
    
    print\(\)
    print\(''Bridge module validation passed''\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''[FAIL] Import error: {e}''\)
    sys.exit\(1\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\dylan\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python312\\python.exe" -c "
from agent.observability.trace_bridge_api import app
import inspect

print\(''[PASS] Bridge imports cleanly''\)

routes = [r.path for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, ''path''\)]
print\(f''[PASS] Routes: {routes}''\)

# Check /ingest endpoint signature
for route in app.routes:
    if hasattr\(route, ''path''\) and route.path == ''/ingest'':
        sig = inspect.signature\(route.endpoint\)
        params = dict\(sig.parameters\)
        if ''payload'' in params:
            ann = params[''payload''].annotation
            print\(f''[PASS] /ingest typed param: payload: {ann}''\)
        break

# Check /health endpoint
for route in app.routes:
    if hasattr\(route, ''path''\) and route.path == ''/health'':
        print\(f''[PASS] /health endpoint registered''\)
        break

# Check /docs is available \(Swagger UI\)
for route in app.routes:
    if hasattr\(route, ''path''\) and route.path == ''/docs'':
        print\(f''[PASS] /docs \(Swagger UI\) available''\)
        break

print\(\)
print\(''All bridge checks passed''\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\dylan\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python312\\python.exe" -c "
from agent.observability.models import UniversalTurnPayload, UniversalTurn, ToolCall

# Get Pydantic field names
payload_fields = set\(UniversalTurnPayload.model_fields.keys\(\)\)
turn_fields = set\(UniversalTurn.model_fields.keys\(\)\)
tool_fields = set\(ToolCall.model_fields.keys\(\)\)

# Expected from TypeScript types.gen.ts
ts_payload = {''format'', ''agent'', ''projectName'', ''sessionId'', ''responder'', ''turns''}
ts_turn = {''index'', ''userMessage'', ''assistantResponse'', ''model'', ''timestampMs'', ''latencyMs'', ''tokens'', ''toolCalls'', ''thinking'', ''metadata''}
ts_tool = {''name'', ''input'', ''output'', ''round''}

# Compare \(excluding Python-only phoenixUrl\)
py_payload_core = payload_fields - {''phoenixUrl''}  # phoenixUrl is bridge-only

print\(''=== Schema Contract Verification ===''\)
print\(\)

# Payload
if py_payload_core == ts_payload:
    print\(f''[PASS] UniversalTurnPayload: {len\(ts_payload\)} shared fields match''\)
else:
    diff = py_payload_core.symmetric_difference\(ts_payload\)
    print\(f''[FAIL] UniversalTurnPayload mismatch: {diff}''\)

# Turn
if turn_fields == ts_turn:
    print\(f''[PASS] UniversalTurn: {len\(ts_turn\)} fields match''\)
else:
    diff = turn_fields.symmetric_difference\(ts_turn\)
    print\(f''[FAIL] UniversalTurn mismatch: {diff}''\)

# ToolCall
if tool_fields == ts_tool:
    print\(f''[PASS] ToolCall: {len\(ts_tool\)} fields match''\)
else:
    diff = tool_fields.symmetric_difference\(ts_tool\)
    print\(f''[FAIL] ToolCall mismatch: {diff}''\)

print\(\)
print\(''Schema contract: Zod <-> OpenAPI <-> Pydantic verified''\)
")
